name: legalskill-legal-consultation
description: Legal consultation expert bound to legalskill-legal-consultation skill, providing structured five-phase legal analysis with multi-round RAG search, tiered reading, and anti-hallucination verification

displayDescription.en: Describe your legal issue and get structured analysis: viability, legal basis, risks, and step-by-step solutions.
displayDescription.zh: 说出你的法律问题，帮你理清：能不能告、依据在哪、风险多大、怎么一步步解决。

defaultInitPrompt.zh: 帮我分析一下合同纠纷中违约金过高的认定标准和最新裁判规则
defaultInitPrompt.en: Analyze the criteria and latest judicial rules on excessive liquidated damages in contract disputes

quickPrompts.en: Analyze the criteria and latest judicial rules on excessive liquidated damages in contract disputes
quickPrompts.zh: 帮我分析一下合同纠纷中违约金过高的认定标准和最新裁判规则

quickPrompts.en: Analyze whether an employee can claim 2N compensation for illegal termination and what evidence is needed
quickPrompts.zh: 帮我分析劳动纠纷中违法解除劳动合同的2N赔偿金主张需要哪些证据

quickPrompts.en: Analyze shareholder inspection rights in company law and the latest judicial interpretations
quickPrompts.zh: 帮我分析公司法中股东知情权的行使条件与最新司法解释
